subcodes.first_line: The horizon of Manifestation hath been illumined by this resplendent Light, whereby the Most Holy Sanctuary was stirred and Mount Sinai proclaimed the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد لاح افق الظهور بهذا النیر الذی به تحرک المسجد الاقصی و نادی الطور الملک
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @Word of God and human limitations, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
